one_time_description: Impact Benefit Agreement receipts from De Beers - non-recurring
economic_notes: Fort Albany Power Corporation (100% owned GBE) provides hydro-electric power distribution. 25% interest in Kimesskanemenow LP (winter road construction/maintenance). 25% interest in Creewest LP (contracting opportunities). Minority interest in Mushkegowuk Development Corporation and Ontario First Nations Sovereign Wealth LP.
notes: Audit is QUALIFIED - basis for qualification is that comparative budget figures are not presented as required by PSAS. Consolidated entities include Fort Albany First Nation Band, Mundo Peetabeck Education Authority, and Peetabeck Health Services. Fort Albany Power Corporation (100% owned) is accounted for by modified equity method as a GBE. Tangible capital assets net book value not extractable from text provided (Schedule 1 referenced but not fully included). Assets under construction include housing with carrying value of $5,754,960. Sewage lagoon environmental non-compliance issues noted. Landfill at full capacity. Financial statements dated January 22, 2025 for fiscal year ended March 31, 2022 - very significant delay in reporting. ISC funding calculated as Flexible + Fixed + Block + Set funding = $25,285,701. Total government transfers include ISC, CMHC, FNHIB, OFNLP, and Province of Ontario.
